guidance-reporting-expectations-for-dual-eligible-beneficiaries-updated/). In other words, for 
territories, CMS finds the Medicare dual coverage code ’10’ to be equivalent to a T-MSIS code ‘08’. 
Note that the income requirements and scope of benefits for dual eligible beneficiaries in the 
territories is different, when compared to the dual benefits for states (reference, for example 
https://www.macpac.gov/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Medicaid-and-CHIP-in-the-Territories.pdf).
